name: Core Development
description: Foundational improvements to the character's base nature and learned skills.

abilities.name: Improved Trait
abilities.description: You have trained hard to improve one of your traits. You immediately gain 1 point in the selected Trait.

abilities.name: Improved Health
abilities.description: You have trained hard to improve your health. You immediately gain a D6 or 3 points, you choose, in the selected Health. The rolled D6 cannot explode.

abilities.name: Improved Skill
abilities.description: You have trained hard to improve one of your skills. You immediately gain a D6 or 3 points, you choose, in the selected Skill.

name: Combat Arts
description: Specialised techniques for physical and mental confrontation.

abilities.name: Ambidexterity
abilities.description: You are trained to use either arm and hand indifferently. When performing an off-hand action, you do not suffer from Disadvantage anymore.

abilities.name: Dual Wielder
abilities.description: Your are trained to wield weapons in your off-hand. When taking the Attack combat action to attack with your dominant hand weapon, you can perform one additional attack with your off-hand weapon as part of the action.

abilities.name: Quick Draw [Weapon Category]
abilities.description: Your are trained to draw your weapon quickly. When acquiring this Ability, select a weapon category. Every time you want to perform an attack with a weapon of that category and you do not have the weapon ready in your hand, you can draw the weapon as part of the Attack combat action. You can select this Ability multiple times, selecting each time a different Weapon Category.

abilities.name: Quick Reload [Weapon Category]
abilities.description: Your are trained to reload your weapon quickly. When acquiring this Ability, select a weapon category. Every time you want to reload a weapon of that category, the amount of Reload combat actions required to fully reload the weapons is reduced by 1. Reducing that amount to 0 implies that the weapon can be fully reloaded as part of the Attack combat action.

name: Tactical Prowess
description: Battlefield control, environmental exploitation, and heightened reactions.

abilities.name: Cover Specialist
abilities.description: You know how to utilise your surroundings effectively. Increase Physical Defence by +1BD whenever you have at least Half Cover.

abilities.name: Suppressing Fire
abilities.description: By unleashing a hail of fire, you pin enemies down. When you perform an Attack action, you can choose to inflict the Restricted condition on the target instead of dealing damage if the attack hits.

abilities.name: Combat Reflexes
abilities.description: Your battle instincts are razor-sharp. You gain a permanent +5 bonus to your Reaction score.

name: Influence and Leadership
description: Social standing, reputation, and the ability to command or inspire others.

abilities.name: Network of Contacts
abilities.description: You have friends in useful places. Each time you take this, define a field (e.g., Criminal, Corporate, Academic). You gain Advantage on Investigation and Insight checks involving that field.

abilities.name: Commanding Presence
abilities.description: Your authority is undeniable. Once per encounter, you may use a Move action to remove the Surprised or Drained condition from an ally within 10 metres.

abilities.name: Words of Strength
abilities.description: You know the words to motivate your group. Once per short rest, you can restore 1 trait die to an ally who is currently Drained.

name: Technical Mastery
description: Interaction with complex machinery, digital interfaces, and academic knowledge.

abilities.name: Jury-rigger
abilities.description: You can fix anything with scrap. You can perform temporary repairs on a device using 1 Use Item action. The item functions for a single encounter before breaking again.

abilities.name: Neural Interface
abilities.description: You have a direct link to machines. You gain Advantage on all Use Skill checks involving Hacking, Piloting, or Remote Operation of drones.

abilities.name: Hacker's Intuition
abilities.description: You navigate digital architectures with ease. The time required for technical tasks involving computers or electronics is halved.

name: Survival and Medicine
description: Stability in the field, emergency care, and environmental resilience.

abilities.name: First Aid
abilities.description: Once per short rest, you can perform a First Aid action. Roll a Medicine skill test vs a Difficulty of 10. Success restores 1D10 points to the target's Physical Health.

abilities.name: Hardened Body
abilities.description: You have survived enough to build extreme resilience. You gain a permanent +10 bonus to your maximum Physical Health.
